items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: A copy-to-clipboard button with blur transition effect.

items.name: audio-waveform
items.title: Audio Waveform
items.description: A static, width-explicit waveform for timelines. Decodes audio (URL / Blob / AudioBuffer) into normalized peaks — or takes precomputed peaks — and renders mirrored canvas bars at any pixel width, with optional played-progress coloring. Backs the waveform-player.

items.name: waveform-player
items.title: Waveform Player
items.description: A compact audio player built on audio-waveform: play/pause, elapsed and total time, played-progress coloring, and click/drag-to-seek on the waveform.

items.name: video-thumbnail-cache
items.title: Video Thumbnail Cache
items.description: Decode video frames via mediabunny on demand and cache them as ImageBitmaps. Backs the thumbnail-strip and segmented-timeline-strip components.

items.name: thumbnail-strip
items.title: Thumbnail Strip
items.description: A viewport-virtualized canvas strip rendering video thumbnails along a horizontal timeline. Pairs with video-thumbnail-cache for the frame decoding.

items.name: segmented-timeline-strip
items.title: Segmented Timeline Strip
items.description: Multi-clip timeline overview built by composing one thumbnail-strip per segment with DOM chrome (active border, dim mask, label, playhead, total duration badge) and click-to-seek.

items.name: timeline-ruler
items.title: Timeline Ruler
items.description: A pure, zoom-aware, horizontally-scrollable time ruler: adaptive tick density and MM:SS / frame labels, with viewport virtualization. Just the scale — playhead, seeking, and tracks are left to the consumer.

items.name: particle-image
items.title: Particle Image
items.description: Turn any image into an interactive particle field that scatters from the pointer and settles back toward its origin.
